query: Switch 2 system update 22.5.0 patch notes full changelog June 2026
a_issues: Content A lacks the key official Nintendo support result. Its snippets are noisier and include inaccuracies/mixed details: IGN snippet says the consoles were brought to version 22.0.5 instead of 22.5.0, and multiple snippets mix Switch 1 patch notes (eShop redesign, video controls) into a query specifically about Switch 2. It also omits one official Switch 2 note present in the anchor: adding Dutch and Russian for “Change Speech ⇔ Text During GameChat” in Accessibility.
b_issues: Content B still includes noisy secondary sources and mixed-in Switch 1 details from IGN/Nintendo Everything, and the Famiboards result is largely irrelevant. However, it contains the official Nintendo support page snippet with a definitive Switch 2-specific patch note, including the otherwise easy-to-miss “Change Speech ⇔ Text During GameChat” Accessibility addition.
reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it includes the official Nintendo Support result for Nintendo Switch 2, which is the most reliable source and directly matches the anchor. From B, an LLM can recover the June 2026 Switch 2 v22.5.0 changelog more accurately: Dutch and Russian were added in Accessibility, including for “Change Speech ⇔ Text During GameChat,” plus the usual general stability improvements as reflected by the anchor/official page. In contrast, A relies only on secondary sources, contains a clear version-number error (22.0.5), and more strongly conflates Switch 1 notes with Switch 2 notes. While neither set is perfect, B is closer to the official facts and less likely to cause a wrong final answer.
